summary: A Russian soldier was killed by two Ukrainian FPV drones striking simultaneously while he was taking cover behind a tree. In the village of Dobropole, a Ukrainian International MaxxPro armored vehicle was destroyed by a Russian fiber-optic FPV drone called "Barmaley." On March 10, 2026, operators of the Russian "Rubicon" Center conducted combat operations across multiple directions—Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman—destroying 162 targets, including Ukrainian personnel and UAV control centers.
